name: Mistral Large
note: Mistral's first GPT-4-class closed flagship, launched with the Microsoft/Azure partnership and Le Chat; retired from the API by 2025.

results.notes: Reported as second only to GPT-4 at launch

verificationNotes: Fetched mistral.ai/news/mistral-large/ directly: confirms 2024-02-26 release, 32K context, native function calling. Fetched promptingguide.ai/models/mistral-large directly: literally confirms 'ranks second next to GPT-4 on the MMLU benchmark with a score of 81.2%'. Params/license genuinely undisclosed by Mistral for this closed model, correctly left null/Proprietary. No changes made.
